entity.summary: On-chain spot exchange and best-execution routing venue for crypto assets and tokenized equities, exchange-traded funds, commodities, and other programmable markets.
entity.notes: Current first-party launch materials and application expose an active PropAMM-driven on-chain spot exchange and routed execution venue on Robinhood Chain. Current independent metrics report non-zero DEX aggregator volume, fees, and revenue. No legal entity or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Introducing Rialto
evidence.notes: First-party announcement describes Rialto as a PropAMM-driven on-chain spot exchange for crypto and tokenized traditional assets and links the live Rialto application and developer documentation.

evidence.title: Rialto Aggregator activity metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics classify Rialto as a DEX aggregator and report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative routed volume together with fees and revenue.
